pages.text: A crafted Eulogia Crystal starts uncharged. Bring it to the configured sky height or higher to let it absorb high-sky light; the server config rituals.skyRitualMinY defaults to Y=200.
The Eulogia Crystal is built around a diamond core and does not consume an Ender Pearl. Newly crafted crystals start uncharged.

Uncharged crystals charge in a player's inventory or on a Sky Offering Table. Ordinary containers do not charge them. The default charge time is 60 seconds, controlled by rituals.eulogiaCrystalChargeSeconds.

When charging finishes, the crystal icon changes and its tooltip says it is charged. A charged Eulogia Crystal can be crafted with #forge:stone into Celestial Stone; Celestial Glass is made through offering.
Celestial Stone is the base material for offering circles, tables, nodes, and vaults.
Celestial Stone slabs, stairs, and walls can all be used in the tier 1 altar frame.
